allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "CommandLine LIKE '%8791%'" | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "done")

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "CommandLine LIKE '%8791%'"; $procs | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine; foreach \($p in $procs\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force }; "done")
